code:
--- title: BaRS Vaccination Appointment Booking Sequence description: Sequence diagram showing the process of booking a vaccination appointment using the BaRS system. author: Matthew Brown date: 2025-08-01 tags: [FinTech_LedgerService] displayMode: sequence config: theme: default look: handdrawn --- sequenceDiagram actor ICB actor P as Patient participant NHSA as NHS App participant BP as BaRS Proxy participant MYA as Manage Your Appt participant NRL as National Record Locator participant NHSN as NHS Notify participant T as Tasking Service (FinTech_LedgerService) note over ICB: ICB has a list of patients
who need to be vaccinated ICB->>+BP: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest %% see https://simplifier.net/nhsbookingandreferrals/~resources?category=Example&exampletype=Bundle&sortBy=DisplayName for example messages BP->>MYA: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest MYA-->>BP: Acknowledge request BP-->>-ICB: Acknowledge request MYA->>T: Create Task for Patient to Book Appointment T-->>MYA: Return Task id MYA->>+NHSN: Inform patient of referral and need to book appt NHSN->>-NHSA: Notify patient NHSA->>P: Notify patient P->>P: Reads notification P->>NHSA: Launches NHS App activate NHSA NHSA<<->>T: Reads and shows patient outstanding tasks P->>NHSA: Clicks "Book Vaccine Appt" generated from Task NHSA->>+BP: Uses Task metadata to query Slots for HealthcareService BP->>MYA: Query Slots MYA-->>BP: Return Slots BP-->>-NHSA: Return Slots P->>NHSA: Choose Appointment Slot NHSA->>+BP: Create Appt w/ Slot Details BP->>MYA: Create Appt w/ Slot Details MYA-->>MYA: Check ServiceRequest for patient eligibility MYA--)T: Mark Task as Complete MYA-->>BP: Confirm Appt Booked Note over MYA: Details on how
Appointment is matched
to ServiceRequest to be defined BP-->>-NHSA: Confirm Appt Booked NHSA-->>P: Show Appointment Confirmation opt MYA->>NHSN: Confirm Appointment Booked via message end deactivate NHSA Note over MYA: Inform NRL of Appointment
in background MYA->>+BP: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status BP->>-NRL: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status
repo_description: repository for hosting random TA PoCs

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为BaRS疫苗预约系统设计一个完整的时序图。核心流程是：ICB有一批需要接种疫苗的患者名单，通过BaRS Proxy发起请求，最终患者能在NHS App上完成预约。关键是要体现Tasking Service和FinTech LedgerService的集成。
明白了。我需要确认几个参与方的关系：Manage Your Appt系统收到BaRS Proxy的请求后，会创建Task并推送给NHS Notify通知患者，对吗？还有National Record Locator是在最后同步预约信息的？
对的。流程分两大阶段：第一阶段是ICB发起ServiceRequest，MYA创建Task并通知患者；第二阶段是患者打开NHS App，查询可用Slot，完成预约后MYA标记Task为Complete，并异步更新NRL。注意Tasking Service返回的是Task id，不是直接处理预约。
好的，我先画出主干流程：ICB向BaRS Proxy发送ServiceRequest，Proxy转发给MYA，MYA创建Task并通知患者。患者端从NHS App启动，读取Task后查询Slot，选择时间后创建Appointment，MYA验证资格并标记Task完成。
还需要补充一个细节：MYA在创建Appointment后，有一个内部检查——验证患者是否符合ServiceRequest中的资格要求。另外，成功后MYA会通过NHS Notify发送确认消息，这个是可选路径，用opt框表示。
关于NRL的更新时机，是在整个交互结束后异步进行的吗？我看到MYA需要创建Appointment Pointer包含日期时间和状态，通过BaRS Proxy写入National Record Locator。
没错，NRL更新是后台异步操作，不阻塞患者端的确认流程。另外，在MYA内部我加了一个注释框：Appointment如何与原始ServiceRequest匹配的具体逻辑还需要定义，这个先占位。
已完成。我检查了激活条：NHS App在患者启动后激活，直到预约确认后关闭。所有异步消息用虚线箭头，创建Appointment的同步调用用实线加号。Tasking Service的集成点清晰标注了FinTech_LedgerService。
等等，我注意到一个细节：MYA向Tasking Service创建Task应该是同步调用，返回Task id，但标记Task为Complete应该是异步的，用开放箭头。另外，ICB最初的那批患者名单需要在Note里说明。
已修正。创建Task用实线箭头返回Task id，标记Complete用异步开放箭头。ICB的Note已添加："ICB has a list of patients who need to be vaccinated"。还有其他需要调整的吗？
最后确认一下：患者点击"Book Vaccine Appt"时，这个按钮是从Task metadata生成的，查询Slot时要通过BaRS Proxy到MYA，不能直接访问。还有，Slot返回后患者选择并创建Appointment，这个创建动作要同时带Slot详情。
已全部落实。流程完整：从ICB批量发起，经BaRS Proxy路由，MYA协调Task和Appointment生命周期，患者通过NHS App完成交互，最终异步同步至NRL。FinTech LedgerService作为Tasking Service的后端已明确标注。
